news.t: The Inflation Impact: 3 ETF Approaches for Managing Risk
Nick Wodeshick from The Alternatives Channel Announces Publication Titled - CPSL: The ETF Seeking 100% Downside Protection in All Seasons
Calamos Launches CPSL, the First ETF to Provide a Systematic Approach to Investing in 100% Downside Protection S&P 500 ETFs

overview.description: The Calamos Laddered S&P 500 Structured Alt Protection ETF (CPSL) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund is an actively managed fund-of-funds that invests in an equal-weighted, laddered portfolio of Calamos S&P 500 Structured Alt Protection ETFs. The fund targets specific buffered losses and capped gains on the SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY). CPSL was launched on Sep 9, 2024 and is issued by Calamos.

data.title: The Inflation Impact: 3 ETF Approaches for Managing Risk
data.text: It certainly seems like the threat of inflation won't be going away any time soon.  On Wednesday, June 10, the CPI numbers for May came out, showing that the index rose 0.5% for the month.
